title: Analysis code for "Encoding Versus Linear Use of Patient Characteristics in Chest X-Ray Foundation Models on MIMIC-CXR"
description: Analysis code and aggregate result tables reproducing the paper "Encoding Versus Linear Use of Patient Characteristics in Chest X-Ray Foundation Models on MIMIC-CXR" (Diagnostics 2026, 16(13), 2030). The code computes attribute encoding strength, residualization-sensitive attribute dependence, attribute-finding odds ratios, nested OLS regressions, leave-one-out cross-validation and robustness checks, and subgroup fairness gaps for nine frozen chest X-ray foundation models on MIMIC-CXR. Credentialed MIMIC-CXR / MIMIC-IV / CheXpert data are not included and are not redistributed; the shipped result CSVs are aggregate statistics only. See README.md and REPRODUCIBILITY.md for data access and the full reproduction recipe.
